human_actions_pending.action: Build and deploy fix-5, hw-verify: launch app, select at least one file with A button, verify no crash on next frame
human_actions_pending.context: fix-5 fixes dangling Application::currentFocus after buildFileList() clears old rows. Crash confirmed via Atmosphere log 01774544686. Build: docker run CMake rebuild → dist/SwitchPalace.nro → SD card.

decisions.decision: Root cause of session-5 crash: dangling Application::currentFocus after buildFileList()
decisions.rationale: clearViews() queues old rows to deletionPool; currentFocus NOT updated; old row deleted at end-of-frame → dangling ptr; next frame vtable ptr in freed memory = 0 → virtual dispatch at vtable[0xf0] → fault address 0xf0 (Data Abort)

decisions.decision: Fix: giveFocus(getDefaultFocus()) after buildFileList() in both click handler and B handler
decisions.rationale: Updates currentFocus to new valid row BEFORE old rows are deleted; properly calls onFocusLost deregistering animations

decisions.decision: Codex workflow = Option B: internal Claude Code Explore subagents for borealis research
decisions.rationale: Confirmed by user 2026-03-26; spawn Explore agents with targeted question, receive summary only in main context

decisions.decision: brls::sync() required for pushActivity from Ticking/RepeatingTask callback
decisions.rationale: pushActivity from updateTickings() (before frame()) caused Data Abort session 4
Fixes borealis pthread task loop crash in NRO context
GLFW glfwInit fails in applet mode on fw 21.1.0
Safe ceiling for applet and application mode

next_action: 1. Rebuild NRO (docker). 2. Deploy to SD. 3. hw-verify: select a file with A, verify no crash. 4. If pass: remove debug logging (fbDebugLog/ivLog/debugLog), write 01-03-SUMMARY.md. 5. If crash: read Atmosphere log, spawn Explore subagent.
context_notes: Session 5: app crashed during file browsing (not install). Root cause: clearViews() in buildFileList() frees focused row to deletionPool but Application::currentFocus not updated. Freed memory vtable=0 → virtual call crashes at 0xf0. Fix: giveFocus(getDefaultFocus()) in click handler (file_browser.cpp:354) and B handler (file_browser.cpp:142). X[6]='_opacity' in crash was bytes 6-13 of 'brls/highlight/shadow_opacity' key being processed in drawHighlight. Two Explore subagents confirmed crash path. borealis source research should always use Explore subagents per user preference.
